MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lauren E. Ingersoll, Esq. of BIRNBERG & ASSOCIATES 398-1040, for defendant Linda McDaniel moving to dismiss for delay in prosecution

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT LINDA MCDANIEL's Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution -- GRANTED -- no opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (PHA/301/JU) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
